title: Dependabot can't parse your go.mod
body:
Dependabot couldn't parse the go.mod found at `/go.mod`.

The error Dependabot encountered was:

```
go: github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.0.1-0.20191126085826-502848a1358b requires
	gopkg.in/check.v1@v1.0.0-20190902080502-41f04d3bba15: unrecognized import path "gopkg.in/check.v1" (https fetch: Get https://gopkg.in/check.v1?go-get=1: EOF)
```

[View the update logs](https://app.dependabot.com/accounts/containers/update-logs/16603342).
